creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 192156
Comparison of some images

(In reply to comment #5)
Attached new archive with images for comparison between LCD_RENDERING=on (LCD_FILTERING=off) and LCD_FILTERING=on (LCD_RENDERING=off) for freetype2 v2.9 (based on changes from attachment #192131):
-8<--
% compare browser_freetype2_2.9_lcd_filtering_off.png browser_freetype2_2.9_lcd_filtering_on.png comparison.png
% pkg info firefox | grep ^Version
Version        : 59.0.2_1,1
-->8-
